source.title: PDD Holdings Q1-Q3 2025 and FY2024 Earnings Releases - Profitability & Interest Income

extractions.claim: PDD generates massive interest/investment income from its ~RMB 424B cash pile — RMB 19.2B in 9M 2025
extractions.evidence: Interest & investment income, net: FY2024: RMB 20,553M. Q1 2025: RMB 223M (anomalously low, likely mark-to-market or reclassification). Q2 2025: RMB 10,423M. Q3 2025: RMB 8,565M. 9M 2025 total: RMB 19,211M. Cash & short-term investments: RMB 424B as of Sep 30, 2025.

verification.verifier_notes: Directly from earnings press releases. Q1 2025 anomaly noted — may reflect fair value changes or reclassification rather than actual interest earned.

extractions.claim: Interest income represents ~25% of operating profit, making it a material non-operating earnings driver
extractions.evidence: 9M 2025: Operating profit RMB 67,904M. Interest & investment income RMB 19,211M (28% of operating profit). FY2024: Operating profit RMB 108,423M. Interest income RMB 20,553M (19% of operating profit). Implied annualized yield on ~RMB 400B average cash: ~6-7%.

verification.verifier_notes: Ratio computed from reported figures. The 6-7% yield seems high, suggesting the 'interest & investment income' line includes gains on short-term investments beyond pure interest, potentially including treasury bond gains and money market fund returns.

extractions.claim: Operating profit margins compressing in 2025 due to merchant support investments
extractions.evidence: Operating margin: Q4 2024: 23.1%. Q1 2025: 16.8%. Q2 2025: 24.8%. Q3 2025: 23.1%. FY2024: 27.5%. 9M 2025: 22.1%. The Q1 2025 dip reflects heavy merchant subsidies under the 'high-quality development' initiative.

verification.verifier_notes: Margins computed from revenue and operating profit figures in earnings releases.

extractions.claim: Net income boosted significantly by non-operating interest income, making reported margins higher than operational reality
extractions.evidence: Q3 2025: Operating profit RMB 25,026M (23.1% margin), but net income RMB 29,328M (27.1% margin). The ~4pp gap is driven by RMB 8,565M interest/investment income. This pattern is consistent across quarters.

verification.verifier_notes: Computed from Q3 2025 earnings release. Net income exceeds operating profit because interest income more than offsets tax.
